title: NASA Climate Kids: Water Cycle
description: A NASA Climate Kids source card about water movement, weather, climate, and Earth systems.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Climate Kids explains the water cycle for learners who are ready to connect evaporation, clouds, precipitation, runoff, oceans, and climate patterns.
Use this source as an accessible bridge from elementary water-cycle vocabulary toward older-student Earth systems reading.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
